query:
ALTER TABLE lectures ADD COLUMN flyerUrl VARCHAR(512) NULL;

INSERT INTO lectures (title, description, sessionDate, zoomLink, flyerUrl, uploadedBy)
VALUES (
  'Designing Qualitative Research in Healthcare: From Clinical Question to Data Collection',
  'Join Dr. Tamadhir Al-Mahrouqi for an in-depth session on designing qualitative research in healthcare settings.

📚 Learning Objectives:
• Understand the principles and types of qualitative research in healthcare
• Learn how to formulate a strong clinical research question
• Explore qualitative data collection methods: interviews, focus groups, and observation
• Understand sampling strategies and participant selection
• Gain practical skills to design your own qualitative research study

👩‍⚕️ Speaker: Dr. Tamadhir Al-Mahrouqi
Psychiatry Resident | OMSB, Muscat
Qualitative Research Specialist | MedResearch Academy

⏱️ Duration: 60 minutes (21:00–22:00 Muscat Time)',
  '2026-03-11 17:00:00',
  'https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/JF4MkhQCSgCAHDmzSA0gTg',
  'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663215016294/nhBvSBzRVZMHXcXT.png',
  1
);
